projects.name: GlassesAI
projects.description: Self-hosted AI voice assistant for Ray-Ban smart glasses. Replaces Meta AI with a fully local pipeline — no cloud, no Meta account required.

projects.name: Paddock
projects.description: Car modification tracker and garage management app with a full-stack backend API and mobile client.

projects.name: Home Lab
projects.description: Self-hosted infrastructure running Nextcloud, Jellyfin, Immich, and Vaultwarden across a Linux server and MacBook, exposed via Traefik reverse proxy.
